name: Bankr
description: Check wallet balance and interact with Bankr on Base and other chains. Requires the Bankr CLI (@bankr/cli) and an API key in the vault.
author: BankrBot
install_command: In chat: "Install the bankr skill from https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/bankr"

name: Weather
description: Get weather forecasts for any city. The agent can use web search to fetch current conditions and forecasts.
author: Akasha

name: Timer & Reminders
description: Set timers and reminders. Scheduled tasks are supported via the built-in calendar and recurring tasks.
author: Akasha

name: Calculator
description: Math and unit conversions. The agent can perform calculations and look up conversions via tools.
author: Akasha
